title: CONVOLVULUS PLURICAULIS
description: Convolvulus pluricaulis, commonly known as Shankhpushpi, is a perennial herb used in Ayurvedic medicine as a potent medhya rasayana (brain tonic). It works through its neuroprotective, antioxidant, and modulator effects on neurotransmitters like serotonin and acetylcholine to enhance cognitive function and reduce psychological distress.

research.title: Role of Shankhpushpi (Convolvulus pluricaulis) in neurological disorders: An umbrella review covering evidence from ethnopharmacology to clinical studies
research.summary: This comprehensive review highlights the herb's ability to improve memory, decrease anxiety, and provide neuroprotection by interacting with serotonergic synapses and reducing neuroinflammation.

research.title: Nootropic, anxiolytic and CNS-depressant studies on different plant sources of shankhpushpi
research.summary: This study identifies Convolvulus pluricaulis as the most effective source of Shankhpushpi for enhancing memory and reducing anxiety when compared to other botanical substitutes.

research.title: In vivo investigation of the neuroprotective property of Convolvulus pluricaulis in scopolamine-induced cognitive impairments in Wistar rats
research.summary: Research demonstrates that the herb successfully reverses cognitive deficits and memory impairment induced by chemical stressors, confirming its role as a neuroprotective agent.

research.title: An update on Ayurvedic herb Convolvulus pluricaulis Choisy
research.summary: A clinical update confirming the plant's therapeutic application in treating chronic cough, sleeplessness, epilepsy, and hallucinations through its calming effect on the central nervous system.

sentiment.summary: Users generally value the herb for its ability to clear mental fog and reduce irritability, often seeking it out as a natural alternative for cognitive support.

effects.label: Memory Recovery:
effects.description: Highly effective at reversing memory deficits caused by external stressors or aging

effects.label: Stress Management:
effects.description: Successfully reduces irritability and psychological distress in regular users

effects.label: Comparative Strength:
effects.description: Clinical data suggests it is the most potent of the three common 'Shankhpushpi' plant sources

effects.label: Neuroprotection:
effects.description: Shows significant promise in the management of neurodegenerative etiologies like Alzheimer's

dosage.label: Standard Nootropic Dose:
dosage.description: Research indicates 100 mg/kg in animal models correlates to effective cognitive enhancement

dosage.label: Ayurvedic Tradition:
dosage.description: Frequently administered as a whole-plant powder or extract in multi-herb formulations

dosage.label: Anxiolytic Dose:
dosage.description: Lower doses are typically sufficient for anxiety, while higher doses induce sedation

dosage.label: Clinical Concentration:
dosage.description: Often found in standardized extracts to ensure bioactive metabolite consistency

sideEffects.label: CNS Depression:
sideEffects.description: May cause excessive drowsiness if taken in very high doses

sideEffects.label: Blood Pressure:
sideEffects.description: Potential hypotensive effects due to its tranquilizing nature

sideEffects.label: Interactions:
sideEffects.description: Should be used with caution when combined with anti-epileptic drugs like Keppra

sideEffects.label: Mild Sedation:
sideEffects.description: Some users may experience a slowing of physical reactions

availability.label: Sourcing Variety:
availability.description: Available through specialized Ayurvedic suppliers and established supplement brands

availability.label: Multi-Herb Blends:
availability.description: Frequently sold as a primary ingredient in 'Brain Tonic' or 'Intellect' herbal complexes
